title: graphephorum psilosanthum
intro: Graphephorum psilosanthum, also known as the prairie coreopsis, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Midwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The health benefits of Graphephorum psilosanthum include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it useful for treating menstrual cramps and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Graphephorum psilosanthum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
